hero.title: Premium Home Healthcare in Dubai – Care You Can Trust
hero.description: 24/7, doctor-led medical care at home, hotel, office, yacht or event. A NADZ specialist can reach you in as little as 30 minutes in Dubai.
hero.reassuranceText: No waiting rooms. No traffic. Just hospital-level care, where you feel safe and comfortable.

statistics.label: Doctor on call & urgent home visits

trustedProviders.title: NADZ Healthcare – Redefining Home Healthcare & Longevity in the UAE
trustedProviders.description: NADZ Healthcare is a premium home healthcare in Dubai and medical concierge service founded and led by Dr. Nadia, a Dubai-based physician passionate about reviving the traditional family-doctor model with modern, data-driven medicine.

card1.title: Rapid, doctor-led care, wherever you are
card1.description: Call or WhatsApp anytime. We triage fast and send the right clinician to your home, hotel, office or venue.

card2.title: Faster decisions with bedside testing
card2.description: Point-of-care instant screens support quicker diagnosis and next steps, without unnecessary delays.

mainGoal.title: Healthcare that feels like family — backed by clinical excellence
mainGoal.description: From urgent doctor visits to advanced diagnostics, IV drips, nursing care and longevity programs, NADZ brings hospital-level standards to you, with privacy, warmth and continuity.
goalsLeft: Doctor-designed protocols led by Dr. Nadia

howItWorks.title: How NADZ Home Healthcare Works

steps.title: Choose a service (24/7)
steps.description: Call or WhatsApp. We'll triage and guide you to the right service.

steps.title: We dispatch the right clinician
steps.description: A DHA-licensed doctor or specialist reviews the need and plans next steps.

steps.title: Get care at home
steps.description: We arrive with the right equipment, medicines or diagnostic tools, often within 30 minutes in Dubai.

howItWorks.ctaSubtext: Follow-up is part of the care.

keyVision.title: Our Vision
keyVision.description: We combine rapid response, clinical excellence and continuity with preventive and longevity care for modern life.

items.title: Path to Wellness
items.description: Preventive care and longevity support, tailored to your biology.

items.title: Stress & Sleep Optimization
items.description: Tools and protocols to improve sleep, regulate stress and restore resilience.

items.title: Diagnostic Services
items.description: Advanced testing and clear interpretation, without clinic visits.

items.title: NADZ Exclusive™
items.description: Signature, doctor-designed programs blending biohacking and advanced diagnostics.

items.title: Paediatric & Family Care
items.description: Care for families and children, from acute illness to vaccinations.

items.title: Teleconsult & Follow-ups
items.description: Continuity beyond the visit: follow-ups, reviews and next-step planning.

items.title: Future of Care
items.description: A modern family-doctor model with home-first convenience and high standards.

items.title: Holistic Health
items.description: Whole-person care that considers lifestyle, prevention and long-term health.

expertDoctors.title: Meet our expert doctors
expertDoctors.subtitle: We aim to share information about our team.

doctors.name: Muheen Peral Khader
doctors.languages: English, Japanese, Hindi, Arabic, Tamil, Malayalam

reviews.author: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Exceptional care. The doctor arrived within 30 minutes and was professional and kind. Highly recommend NADZ for home healthcare in Dubai.

reviews.author: Ahmed K.
reviews.text: Used their nursing care for my mother. The team was compassionate and skilled. Couldn't ask for better service.

reviews.author: Emma L.
reviews.text: Booked a home visit for my child. Fast, thorough, and the follow-up was excellent. NADZ feels like having a family doctor again.

premiumCta.title: For your child. For your Family. For you.
premiumCta.description: Discreet, doctor-led care at your hotel, residence, or office. Fast triage, clear next steps, and follow-up support.
